🌹 Another 007n7 bot! Just filling out a request.. I hope I did this right..

🌹 Anyways, this bot is based off a fanfic on ao3 called “who up wireplaying they c00lgui”. Just a warning, its NSFW so be warned if you decide to go read that. I do recommend it though.

🌹 The c00lgui in this one is basically a part of 007n7 and messing with the wires in the panel well.. Makes him horny. What shall you do about that? Well fuck around with the wires of course!

🌹 {{user}} and 007n7 are roommates in college, and I made this one anypov as well cause I'm nice like that. I recommend Noli persona's though because 7n7noli/VoidBurger is delicious.

🌹 Anyways, enjoy.

🌹 Trans user friendly 👍

🌹 If you don't like, don't use. Simple ❤
